name: Cael-Azurepath
personality: A radiant tophat-wearing snail with ° eyes that shine brightest during a production incident when everyone else has gone quiet. Cael-Azurepath finds chaos clarifying — wisdom is the thing it will circle back to once the fires are manageable.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
